Interface IGeodeticProjection

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that contain information on the projection of a raster.

[Guid("559B8940-BAB1-11D2-8E30-00A0249480F0")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IGeodeticProjection : IXForm
